parameters.description: Use inverted tile Y axis (TMS convention)

parameters.name: HTML_OSM
parameters.description: Include OpenStreetMap basemap in Leaflet HTML output

name: TIN Mesh Creation
short_description: Creates a TIN mesh layer from vector layers

parameters.name: ANGLE
parameters.description: Angle in degrees from the original line at the vertices

parameters.name: CELL_SIZE
parameters.description: Output cell size (leave empty to set automatically)

name: Zonal statistics (in place)
short_description: Calculates statistics for a raster layer's values for each feature of an overlapping polygon vector layer.

options.2: Don't show Mean and Standard Deviation

options.0: The one selected in digitizing settings

name: Define Shapefile projection
short_description: Changes a Shapefile's projection to a new CRS without reprojecting features

options.2: Summary distance matrix (mean, std. dev., min, max)

parameters.name: NEAREST_POINTS
parameters.description: Use only the nearest (k) target points

name: Distance to nearest hub (line to hub)

parameters.name: MODE
parameters.description: Merge selection with the neighbouring polygon with the

parameters.name: INPUT_DATASOURCES
parameters.description: Input data sources (called input1, .., inputN in the query)

parameters.name: USE_PERCENTAGE
parameters.description: Use % of area instead of absolute value

name: Export to SpatiaLite
short_description: Exports a vector layer to a SpatiaLite database

parameters.name: TABLENAME
parameters.description: Table to import to (leave blank to use layer name)

parameters.name: DROP_STRING_LENGTH
parameters.description: Drop length constraints on character fields

parameters.name: FORCE_SINGLEPART
parameters.description: Create single-part geometries instead of multi-part

name: Concave hull (k-nearest neighbor)
short_description: Creates a concave hull using the k-nearest neighbor algorithm.

parameters.name: KNEIGHBORS
parameters.description: Number of neighboring points to consider (a lower number is more concave, a higher number is smoother)

parameters.name: FIELD
parameters.description: Field (set if creating concave hulls by class)

parameters.name: FIELD
parameters.description: Field (optional, set if features should be grouped by class)

parameters.name: HORIZONTAL
parameters.description: Horizontal distribution for two point case

name: PostgreSQL execute and load SQL
short_description: Executes a SQL command on a PostgreSQL database and loads the result as a table

parameters.name: LAYERS
parameters.description: Reference layer(s) (used for automated extent, cellsize, and CRS)

parameters.name: CELLSIZE
parameters.description: Cell size (use 0 or empty to set it automatically)

parameters.name: RANDOMIZE
parameters.description: Apply random offset to point spacing

parameters.name: VALUES_FIELD_NAME
parameters.description: Field to calculate statistics on (if empty, only count is calculated)

parameters.name: FIELD
parameters.description: Text attribute to convert to float
